title: Butter Together
description: An exploration of how various recipe features affect ratings, using a RandomForestClassifier with GridSearchCV to identify the most influential predictors.

title: Metrics to Medals
description: Predicts Olympic medal counts by country using economic, demographic, and health data (1976–2016). Regression models with forward-chaining cross-validation show that health indicators modestly improve predictions, with under-5 mortality as a key negative predictor.

title: Sizing Up The Snack Aisle
description: Visualizes the relationship between snack categories and food processing scores using sorted side-by-side box plots. Highlights differences in processing levels, with median-based ordering and a threshold line to distinguish highly processed foods.

title: Spotify Song Popularity Prediction
description: Predicts song popularity using Spotify artist and track-level features with logistic regression and Random Forest models. Addresses class imbalance through weighting, improving recall for popular tracks, and finds that artist popularity is the strongest predictor of success.

title: Environmental Club App
description: Developed an iphone app for my local high school's environmental club. App included a events calendar, blog, and daily composting reminder.

title: Customer Churn Prediction Model
description: Built a machine learning model to predict customer churn using logistic regression and random forests. Performed feature engineering on behavioral data and improved retention prediction accuracy by 18%.

title: Food Processing Score Visualization
description: Developed an interactive visualization analyzing snack categories and food processing levels. Used D3.js to help users better understand nutritional quality and make informed dietary choices.

title: Housing Price Regression Analysis
description: Analyzed housing market trends using multiple linear regression. Identified key factors influencing price such as location, square footage, and market demand, achieving strong predictive performance.

title: Wildfire Risk Mapping System
description: Created a geospatial model to assess wildfire risk using climate and vegetation data. Visualized high-risk zones with Python and GIS tools to support disaster preparedness efforts.

title: Stock Market Sentiment Analyzer
description: Built a natural language processing pipeline to analyze financial news sentiment. Correlated sentiment scores with stock price movements to identify short-term trading signals.

title: COVID-19 Data Dashboard
description: Designed a real-time dashboard tracking COVID-19 cases and trends. Integrated public datasets and created visualizations to communicate infection rates and regional impacts clearly.

title: Sales Forecasting with Time Series Models
description: Implemented ARIMA and seasonal models to forecast retail sales. Improved demand planning by identifying seasonal patterns and reducing forecast error.
